heading: Data standards for security-based swap reporting
label: 78rr Data standards for security-based swap reporting
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this Act”. See References in Text note set out under .section 78a of this title

Codification, which directed amendment of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 by adding this section at the end, is reflected in the source credit above as adding this section to title I of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 117–263

Rule of Construction—No New Disclosure RequirementsEnactment of section not to be construed to require certain additional information to be collected or disclosed, see , set out as a note under .section 5826 of Pub. L. 117–263section 77g of this title
amendments: Codification, which directed amendment of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 by adding this section at the end, is reflected in the source credit above as adding this section to title I of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 117–263

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: a Requirement
children.text: The Commission shall, by rule, adopt data standards for all reports related to security-based swaps that are required under this chapter.

children.heading: Consistency
children.label: b Consistency
children.text: The data standards required under subsection (a) shall incorporate, and ensure compatibility with (to the extent feasible), all applicable data standards established in the rules promulgated under , including, to the extent practicable, by having the characteristics described in clauses (i) through (vi) of subsection (c)(1)(B) of such section 5334.section 5334 of title 12
